title: [F] Support dropdown formulas
author: ralyodio
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

I have a spreedsheet (xlsx) that uses the values of another sheet to populate a dropdown. I just get [Object object] when using it here.

## Motivation

I have a spreedsheet (xlsx) that uses the values of another sheet to populate a dropdown. I just get [Object object] when using it here.

## Example

I have a spreedsheet (xlsx) that uses the values of another sheet to populate a dropdown. I just get [Object object] when using it here.
